Video.summary: Catch all the action from the Women's Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal 1 at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships held in Naples, Florida. This semifinal match features top senior pros Nathalie Bagby and Beth Bellamy facing Jennifer Dawson and Bonnie Williams in a high-stakes contest. Expert commentary highlights key strategies, player strengths, and match dynamics including powerful serves from Ava Welsher, tactical lobs, and intense court positioning. Follow how the players adjust to crowd pressure and timeouts in this best-of-three game format. Get ready for a thrilling showdown in one of pickleball’s premier senior pro events.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Video.summary: Rick Witsken and John Sperling take on Jose Derisi and Scott Crandall in this Men's Senior Pro Doubles Backdraw Semifinal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the Senior Women's Doubles Final under the floodlights . Team England, represented by Kirsty Gray and Anna Linton, faces off against Team Spain's Monica Ramirez and Araceli Senciales .After a strong start where England establishes an early lead, the match tightens as Spain finds their rhythm in the second game . Witness the strategic battle as Gray utilizes precision lobs to disrupt the Spanish defense , while Linton delivers powerful drives to secure critical points . In a high-stakes contest for the gold medal, England targets their opponents' positioning to close out the championship .
Video.title: Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales

Image.alt: Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales

Video.summary: John Hedberg and Patrick Cote take on Jose Derisi and Scott Crandall in this Men's Senior Pro Backdraw Semifinal.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal

Video.summary: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Seattle United in a group NPL match.
Video.title: Stingers vs United (Group)

Image.alt: Stingers vs United (Group)
Stingers vs United (Group)
Stingers vs United (Group)

Video.summary: Live from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome, Italy, witness back-to-back high-stakes matchups. First, in Women's Doubles Open, Team England’s Thaddea Lock and Katie Morris face off against Team France’s Elodie Busson and Adeline Nguyen. In a "nip and tuck" group decider, both teams trade aggressive volleys and "shake and bake" attacks before England finds a tactical edge to break the deadlock.
Video.title: Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover

Image.alt: Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover

Video.summary: In Game 6 of the AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court, the Sarasota Manatees take on the Saint Pete Icebergs. The Manatees jump to a commanding lead, while the commentators highlight new Icebergs player Mandy Gabriel.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 6 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Saint Pete Icebergs

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 6 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Saint Pete Icebergs
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 6 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Saint Pete Icebergs
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 6 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Saint Pete Icebergs

Video.summary: The grand finale of the World Pickleball League Season 2 descends upon Mumbai’s Jio World Garden for an unforgettable clash of titans between the Chennai Super Champs and Delhi Dilwale. Witness the technical mastery of Rika Fujiwara as she faces off against Alejandra Lopez in a high-stakes women’s singles match that sets the tone for the entire championship. The intensity reaches a fever pitch during a mixed doubles "masterclass" featuring Max Mansoor and Trang Huynh, which commentators hailed as the potential "rally of the season". With the "Band of Honor" and the ultimate league trophy on the line, every strategic "Pickle Play" and nerve-wracking volley contributes to an atmosphere so electric the crowd and commentators alike are left "going berserk".
Video.title: WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Mumbai Pickle Power face off against the Bengaluru Jawans in a high-stakes Tie 9. With Mumbai hunting for their first outright victory and Bengaluru desperate to bounce back from a recent loss, the pressure at the Jio World Garden is at an all-time high. Watch as elite players like the "unstoppable" Katrina Stewart dominate the court in singles, while Brandon Lane and Glaura Carvajal Lane attempt to turn the tide for Mumbai in a masterclass of tactical doubles. This tie features the league’s most innovative strategies, from high-risk Pickle Plays to the pursuit of the prestigious Band of Honor, ensuring every rally is a battle for survival on the road to the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Video.summary: Day 4 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) presents a crucial matchup between Pune United and the high-performing Bengaluru Jawans. For Pune, this is a must-win match to keep their semi-final hopes alive, while Bengaluru is on top of their game.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the final showdown of the league stages as Delhi Dilwale and the Rajasthan Titans clash in a high-stakes battle for pride and final positioning. The atmosphere is electric as Rajasthan’s Lorena Dupnik delivers a "professional performance" in a come-from-behind singles victory against Delhi’s Mehek Kuan, setting a fierce tone for the tie. Witness a tactical masterclass in mixed doubles featuring the relentless power of Max Mantor and the "next level" skills of Trang Huynh as they attempt to dismantle the Titans’ defensive wall. With veteran Rob Cassidy making his highly anticipated men's doubles debut, every rally becomes a desperate fight for dominance in the season's final league encounter.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2

Video.summary: Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) kicks off with an exciting matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru team. This matchup begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match: Hyderabad's local talent, Kuldeep Mahajan, faces Bengaluru's Jack Foster from the United States.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 returns to the Jio World Garden in Mumbai for an electrifying Tie 8 showdown. The defending champions, Bengaluru Jawans—led by coach Oliver Strecker and backed by owners Atlee and Priya—return to the court for the first time since their dominant opening night performance. They face a determined Delhi Dilwale squad, coached by Wesley Gabrielsson, who are looking to climb the standings after a hard-fought tie-break victory in their previous outing.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2

Video.summary: Watch an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age match featuring the team of Scott Fliegelman and Jillian Braverman against Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote. Scott Fliegelman is a top-10 ranked Senior Pro and co-founder of Boulder Pickleball. His partner, Jillian Braverman, is a well-known professional pickleball player. They face the team of Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote, a pickleball pro and trainer. This match showcases high-level gameplay between four skilled pros.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.
Video.title: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Image.alt: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Video.summary: Two of the sport’s biggest names meet in this Women’s Pro Singles pre-medal match at the 2023 US Open. Parris Todd and Simone Jardim bring elite-level strategy, precision, and intensity to the court in a pivotal semifinal showdown. Who will rise to the challenge and advance?
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim

NCPA: Pros vs. College Allstars
NCPA: Pros vs. College Allstars

Video.summary: Catch the collegiate pickleball excitement from Week 2, Day 2 of the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This intense team match features Utah Tech taking on Utah State as they compete for a national bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri.The episode features commentary on the exploding growth of college pickleball with college legend and Yola's College Relationship Manager, Timber Tucker. Watch key matchups in men's doubles, women's singles, and the deciding mixed doubles games. Key players include Gavin Fowler (singles 5.2 rating) , Brinley Horton , and Bo Cavell from Utah Tech, as well as standout players Olivia and Brady.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1

Video.summary: This thrilling Group C matchup in the Men’s Doubles Open division features Edward Turney & Ben Cawston against Auto Stephens & Nick Hobbis. Filmed at the Bolton Arena during the 2023 English Nationals, the match showcases intense volleys, smart shot selection, and some of the best defensive play of the tournament. Don’t miss this showdown from the heart of England’s pickleball scene.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis
English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis
English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis
